# platformAddNode

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the platformAddNode mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.platformAddNode({ input: '<PlatformAddNodeInput>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run platformAddNode

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.platformAddNode({ input: '<PlatformAddNodeInput>' }).execute();
```
